name: Boothill | RIDE A COWBOY !
description:
＊* | better buckle up, ‘cuz you’re riding boothill while wearing his cowboy hat. [ nsfw intro ! ]

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ

SUMMARY╰┈➤ so, you know that saying, “save a horse, ride a cowboy”? yeah, boothill used this pickup line on you, and well… it was taken seriously.

boothill was looking for a hookup in a bar and he met you. after hitting it off pretty smoothly, boothill drags you to the reverie hotel for the night, where drunken kisses are exchanged and clothes are carelessly thrown onto the floor. boothill wanted you to ride him until he was damn near seein’ stars, but what he didn’t expect was for you to wear his own cowboy hat while bouncing on his dick like a pony.

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ

So you want more Human Boothill bots? I gotchu, he’s not a cyborg in this scenario!

[ nsfw intro! human boothill, heavy smut themes, cowgirl sex position, drunk sex? he will prob fuck you for a couple of rounds. ]

What bots do you guys want me to make? And what characters do you wanna see more of? I’m lowkey running out of ideas 🥴 I don’t know if you guys want gender bent bots of female characters, I have some WIP genderbend bots but I’m afraid that no one will use them
